name: Internal Network Reconnaissance
description: Detects use of discovery commands like net, whoami, ipconfig
query:
// Internal Reconnaissance Commands
// Common discovery commands in rapid succession
events from endpoint
where process_name in ("net.exe", "whoami.exe", "ipconfig.exe", "systeminfo.exe", "nltest.exe")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 5
within 300 seconds
